mainWheel.pleaseInclude: Please include at least one item in the wheel

exploreMore.title: Explore More Free Spinning Wheels
exploreMore.descDefault: Looking for a different kind of random picker? Check out our other free wheel tools:
exploreMore.descFood: Need to make other types of decisions? Try our other tools:
exploreMore.rwDesc: The ultimate customizable wheel for practically any choice.
exploreMore.wonDesc: A perfect companion for giveaways, classroom participation, or assigning tasks.
exploreMore.ynwDesc: A simple yes or no spinner to handle quick binary choices instantly.
exploreMore.stwDesc: A fully customizable random picker for any situation.

home.whatIsDesc: A Random Wheel is an interactive tool that spins to make a random selection from a set of choices. Whether you're picking names, colors, numbers, or yes/no answers, a random spinner adds fun and fairness to decision-making. Ideal for games, raffles, classroom activities, or just making everyday choices easier, random wheels are simple, engaging, and widely used. Try a random wheel spinner to add excitement to your next decision!
home.howWorksDesc: A Random Wheel operates by spinning a digital wheel divided into multiple sections, each containing a unique option. When the wheel is spun, it randomly lands on one of these sections, providing an unbiased selection.
home.stepsTitle: Steps to Use a Random Wheel:
home.step1Desc: You can typically add items (like names, tasks, or decisions) one by one or paste a whole list.
home.step2Desc: Once your choices are in and you're happy with the look, just initiate the spin. There's usually a clear button like "Spin the Wheel!".

stepsList.1: Enter Your Options – Add names, numbers, colors, or choices to the wheel.
stepsList.2: Spin the Wheel – Click or tap the spin button to start the random selection process.
stepsList.3: Get Instant Results – The wheel stops on a random choice, providing your answer.
stepsList.4: Repeat as Needed – You can spin again for new results or customize the wheel for different decisions.

home.manageDesc: Depending on the specific tool, you might find features like:

manageList.modes: Modes: You might be able to choose different ways for the wheel to work, like 'Elimination' mode where the chosen option is removed for the next spin.
manageList.editing: Editing: Most tools let you edit, duplicate, hide, or delete the entries you've added. You can also usually clear the whole list easily.
manageList.sharing: Saving/Sharing: You can often save your wheel setup (sometimes requires an account) and share it with others using a link or maybe even get code to embed it.
manageList.results: Results: Some wheels might keep track of past results.

home.otherToolsDesc: Other than the main random Wheel, there are several specialized tools of random Wheel created as well.

otherToolsList.names: Name Pickers / Student Selectors: Commonly used by educators to randomly select individuals, sometimes called "Wheel of Names" or "Random Name Picker".
otherToolsList.food: Food Wheel: Unsure what to eat? Spin the food wheel for quick random meal decisions.
otherToolsList.spin: Spin the Wheel: A fully customizable random picker for any situation.

home.otherToolsOutro: Each specialized version takes the core concept of random selection and tailors it to meet distinct needs, making them handy for everything from organizing activities to settling debates with a fun, impartial twist.

yesNoPage.title: Yes/No Wheel Picker
yesNoPage.heroDesc: Can't decide between yes and no? Let our wheel decide for you! Customize the wheel with different modes and input sets to get the answer you need.

steps.1: Choose between "YES or NO" mode or "YES NO or MAYBE" mode
steps.2: Select the number of input sets (1-5) to adjust the probability distribution
steps.3: Click the "Spin" button to get your answer
steps.4: The result will be highlighted and counted in the boxes above
steps.5: Use the "Reset Results" button to clear all counters

yesNoPage.seoDesc1: Life is full of choices, and sometimes the simplest ones are the hardest. Our Yes/No Wheel Spinner is the perfect decision maker when you're stuck. It's a fun and fast way to get a random choice, acting as a quick yes or no generator.

seoList.2: Make Quick Decisions: Decide on dinner, movie night, or simple daily choices effortlessly.
seoList.3: Add Fun: Inject randomness and excitement into group activities.
seoList.4: Overcome Indecision: Let the wheel break the deadlock when you're truly undecided.

yesNoPage.seoDesc2: Whether you need a simple yes or no, or want to add 'maybe' for more nuance, this fun decision tool provides an unbiased answer instantly. Spin the wheel and let fate decide!
yesNoPage.moreDesc: While great for straightforward yes/no questions, this tool can be surprisingly versatile:

moreList.1: Learning & Study Aid: Quiz yourself! Frame questions with a yes/no answer and spin.
moreList.2: Creative Prompts: Stuck on a story or project? Use the wheel for binary creative decisions.
moreList.3: Breaking Habits: Trying to decide whether to indulge in a minor temptation? Let the wheel add a layer of chance.
moreList.4: Fair Turn-Taking: Use it in games to decide who goes next.

yesNoPage.powerDesc: Our wheel uses a reliable pseudo-random number generator to ensure each spin is fair and unpredictable. This removes personal bias from simple decisions, making it a truly impartial decision maker. Sometimes, leaving small choices to chance can free up mental energy for more important matters! The optional 'Maybe' adds flexibility for those times when a simple yes or no isn't quite enough.

foodPage.title: Food Wheel
foodPage.heroTitle: Food Wheel — What Should I Eat?
foodPage.heroDesc: Can't decide what to eat for lunch or dinner? Spin the Food Wheel and let fate decide! Whether you are craving pizza, sushi, or looking for a healthy salad, just add your options, give the wheel a spin, and your meal is set.
foodPage.howToTitle: How to Use the Food Wheel

steps.1: Add Cravings and Options — Type each food name or restaurant and click the + button.
steps.2: Customise Colours — Click the colour swatch next to any food to change the slice colour.
steps.3: Spin the Wheel — Click Spin the Wheel or the centre button on the wheel.
steps.4: See the Winner — The chosen food appears above the wheel with a 🎉 celebration. You can finally stop debating and start eating!
steps.5: Spin Again — Still not convinced? Keep spinning or remove the options you don't like using the Remove feature.

foodPage.seoDesc: A Food Wheel is a digital spinning wheel specifically used for picking random meals, restaurants, or cuisines from a list. It solves the classic "What do you want to eat?" problem.

seoList.1: Restaurant decider — Can't agree on a restaurant? Add the top 5 choices and let the wheel choose.
seoList.2: Meal prep roulette — Make cooking fun by spinning for your proteins, carbs, and veggies.
seoList.3: Takeout randomizer — Pizza? Chinese? Thai? Spin whenever you have cravings.
seoList.4: Office party catering — Let the team submit options and use the wheel to decide food.

foodPage.whyDesc: Skip the endless scrolling on delivery apps. Our Food Wheel helps you decide fast and fairly:

features.1Desc: No more "I don't know, what do you want?" Spin the wheel and the decision is made instantly.
features.2Desc: No account needed. Open the page, type your food options, and spin right away.
features.3Desc: Add emojis, change slice colours to match the food, and exclude options.
features.4Desc: Cryptographically secure randomness means you're actually getting an unbiased roll.
features.5Desc: Perfect for deciding on the go. The fully responsive design looks great on any phone.
features.6Desc: Our Food Wheel is always free, with no paywalls or required sign-ups.

faqs.1Title: Does the Food Wheel work on my phone?
faqs.1Desc: Yes! The Food Wheel is completely mobile-friendly.
faqs.2Desc: Yes. Every spin uses a robust pseudo-random algorithm to guarantee that each food option has an equal chance.
faqs.3Title: Can I save my favorite food lists?
faqs.3Desc: As long as you keep the browser tab open, your lists remain active. We recommend bookmarking the page.

spinPage.title: Spin the Wheel
spinPage.heroTitle: Spin the Wheel — Custom Random Picker
spinPage.heroDesc: Create your own custom Spin the Wheel to make decisions, play games, or pick a random winner. Enter your choices, spin the wheel, and let the fun begin!
spinPage.howToTitle: How to Use the Custom Wheel

steps.1: Enter your inputs — Add names, numbers, words, or anything else you need to decide on.
steps.2: Customise colours — Change the slice colours to match your theme.
steps.3: Spin the Wheel — Click the big spin button in the middle or below the wheel.
steps.4: See the Result — The winning item will be announced and tracked in the counters.
steps.5: Manage options — Remove, duplicate, or temporarily hide options for your next spin.

spinPage.seoTitle: What Is a Custom Spin the Wheel?
spinPage.seoDesc: A Custom Spin the Wheel allows you to turn any list of options into a fun, interactive roulette. Whether you're organizing a raffle, dividing chores, or just trying to decide what movie to watch, a random wheel makes the process unbiased and exciting.

seoList.1: Party Games — Create custom Truth or Dare prompts or drinking games.
seoList.2: Classroom Activities — Pick a subject, a reward, or a student at random.
seoList.3: Daily Decisions — Decide who does the dishes or takes out the trash.
seoList.4: Giveaways — Fairly pick a winner from a list of contestants.

spinPage.whyDesc: Our wheel spinner is designed to be the most flexible and easy-to-use option available:

features.1Desc: Add as many options as you want, change weights by copying slices, and customize colours.
features.2Desc: No login or downloads required. Just type and spin instantly.
features.3Desc: Your wheel configuration stays active as long as you keep the browser tab open.
features.4Desc: Our algorithm ensures a truly random and unbiased result every single time.

article.sec1Title: Why Custom Spin the Wheel Tools Are So Popular
article.sec1Text: Let's be honest, making decisions all day can be exhausting. Whether you're trying to figure out what to have for dinner, picking a winner for a giveaway on your social media, or just deciding who pays for coffee, sometimes it's just easier to let fate decide. A custom spin the wheel tool is the perfect shortcut for those moments. Instead of endlessly scrolling or debating with your friends, you just drop your options into a wheel and press spin. Best of all, you're not stuck with a pre-set list. You can add literally anything to the slices—names, places, numbers, or even dare challenges for a party game. It works well because the rotating wheel and satisfying click give everyone involved a tiny burst of excitement. It takes a boring chore like "picking someone to do the dishes" and turns it into a quick, fun game.
article.sec2Title: Why We Love Leaving Things to Chance
article.sec2Text: There's a reason we flip coins and draw straws. The human brain actually loves leaving things up to chance because it takes the heat off of us. If you pick someone randomly out of a hat, nobody can argue that you were playing favorites. The same logic applies to a digital spinner wheel. It’s completely impartial, which instantly cuts out the "that's not fair" arguments. When a spinning wheel slows down and finally clicks onto the winner, it actually triggers a little hit of dopamine in our brains. That suspense—even if you're just picking a movie to watch on Netflix—is exactly why randomized wheels are so engaging. By turning a simple decision into a visual game, you're getting people to pay attention and accept the outcome with a smile.
article.sec3Title: A Game-Changer for Teachers and Classrooms
article.sec3TextStart: If you've ever stood at the front of a classroom, you know how hard it is to get everyone participating equally. The same three kids always raise their hands, while the rest try to blend into their chairs. That's why teachers love using a
article.sec3TextMiddle: or a custom spinner. When you put the class list on a wheel and project it onto the board, every single student knows they have an equal chance of being called on. This keeps the room alert without feeling like anyone is being unfairly targeted. You can use it for way more than just picking a student to answer a question, too. You can load a wheel with math problems, vocabulary words, or discussion topics. To make things even easier, the dedicated
article.sec3TextEnd: lets you remove a name after it's been picked, meaning every student gets a turn before anyone gets called on twice.
article.sec4Title: Stop Arguing Over What to Eat
article.sec4TextStart: We've all been there: "What do you want to eat?" "I don't know, what do you want?" It's the conversation that never ends. The more takeout options we have, the harder it gets to just make a choice. If you're tired of debating, the
article.sec4TextMiddle: is exactly what you need. Just plug in four or five places you'd be happy with, hit spin, and commit to whatever it lands on. No more going back and forth for 45 minutes. Not only does it save time, but it also forces you to break out of your regular ordering habits. Throw in that one thai place you haven't tried yet as a wildcard, and let the wheel spice up your routine. If you need a quick decision on the go, jump over to the
article.sec4TextEnd: page. It's pre-themed and looks great on your phone when hunger strikes.
article.sec5TextStart: A huge custom wheel is great for long lists, but sometimes you just need a straight yes or no answer. Should I buy these shoes? Should I skip the gym today? For those quick binary choices, a
article.sec5TextMiddle: is the perfect digital coin toss. Sometimes, you might actually already know what you want to do, and the wheel helps you figure it out. If the wheel lands on "No" and you immediately feel disappointed, well, then you obviously wanted to do it! You can also tweak the odds. If you really want to go to the gym but need a tiny push, put three "Yes" slices and one "No" slice on the wheel. For things that aren't totally black and white, adding a "Maybe" slice gives you a handy out. Whenever you need an instant answer without the fuss, the
article.sec6Title: Customize It Exactly How You Want
article.sec6TextMiddle: better than most apps is the fact that you can tweak everything about it. If you're running a serious company giveaway or streaming on Twitch, you need more than just a basic spinner. For example, if you want some prizes to be rarer than others, you can just duplicate the smaller prizes multiple times on the wheel so they are more likely to be hit. This "weighting" feature gives you total control over the odds. You can also dive into the colors and visually match the wheel to your brand or party theme. With features that let you track how many times an option has won, hide choices instantly, and tweak how the wheel looks, it's a completely professional tool disguised as a fun game. Try out the
article.sec6TextEnd: and take the stress out of your next big decision.

namesPage.title: Wheel of Names
namesPage.heroTitle: Wheel of Names — Free Random Name Picker
namesPage.heroDesc: Type in any names, give the wheel a spin, and let fate pick a winner in seconds. Whether you need a random name picker for your classroom, a fair draw for a giveaway, or a quick way to assign tasks to your team — this free Wheel of Names has you covered. No sign-up, no download, works on any device.
namesPage.howToTitle: How to Use the Wheel of Names

steps.1: Add Names — Type each name in the input box and press Enter.
steps.2: Customise Colours — Click the colour swatch next to any name.
steps.3: Spin the Wheel — Click Spin the Wheel or the centre button.
steps.4: See the Winner — The chosen name appears above the wheel with a 🎉 celebration. The win count tracks how many times each name has been picked.
steps.5: Spin Again — Keep spinning for multiple rounds. Use Exclude to remove winners from future spins, or Reset to start fresh.

namesPage.seoTitle: What Is a Wheel of Names?
namesPage.seoDesc: A Wheel of Names is a digital spinning wheel pre-designed for picking random names from a list. It works the same way as a classic prize wheel — you add any names you like, click spin, and the wheel lands on a winner at random.

seoList.1: Classroom random name picker — Teachers use a wheel of names to call on students without bias.
seoList.2: Giveaways & contests — Running a social-media giveaway? Add all participant names and spin.
seoList.3: Team selection — Randomly split players into teams, pick a team captain, or assign roles.
seoList.4: Office games & icebreakers — Who presents first? Who brings coffee tomorrow? Let the wheel decide.

namesPage.whyTitle: Why Use Our Wheel of Names?
namesPage.whyDesc: There are many name-picker tools online, but our stands out for a handful of key reasons:

features.1Desc: We use a cryptographically seeded pseudo-random number generator to ensure every spin is completely unpredictable.
features.2Desc: No account needed. Open the page, type your names, and spin. The entire process takes under 30 seconds.
features.3Desc: Change slice colours, reorder names, duplicate entries for weighted results, or exclude certain names.
features.4Desc: The wheel tracks how many times each name has been picked across multiple rounds.
features.5Desc: Fully responsive design means the wheel looks and works great on phones, tablets, and desktops alike.
features.6Desc: No ads interrupting your spin, no premium tiers, and no subscription. 100% free, forever.

namesPage.tipsTitle: Tips for Getting the Most Out of Your Name Wheel

tips.1Desc: Want to increase the chances of a particular name being chosen? Simply add that name multiple times using the Copy button. Each duplicate entry gets its own slice, effectively doubling (or tripling) that person's probability of being picked.
tips.2Desc: Running a tournament, quiz show, or raffle? Use the Exclude button to remove each winner from subsequent spins. This ensures every participant can only win once.
tips.3Desc: If you re-use the same list of names regularly, hit the Shuffle button before spinning. Shuffling randomises the starting order of slices.
tips.4Desc: Need the same names every lesson or meeting? Simply keep the browser tab open — the names stay on the wheel until you reset or close the page.

faqs.1Title: Is the Wheel of Names completely random?
faqs.1Desc: Yes. Each spin uses JavaScript's Math.random() function, which generates a pseudo-random number to determine the winning slice.
faqs.2Title: How many names can I add to the wheel?
faqs.2Desc: There is no hard limit. The wheel automatically resizes each slice to fit all entries. For best readability, we recommend keeping it under 50 names.
faqs.3Title: Can I save my wheel of names?
faqs.3Desc: Your names are stored as long as the page is open. Bookmark the page after adding your names — reopening the same tab in most browsers will restore the state.
faqs.4Title: Does the Wheel of Names work on mobile?
faqs.4Desc: Absolutely. The wheel is fully responsive and works on iOS, Android, and any modern mobile browser.
faqs.5Title: What is the difference between the Wheel of Names and a random name generator?
faqs.5Desc: A random name generator typically creates fictional names from a database. Our Wheel of Names picks from the specific names you provide.
faqs.6Title: Can I use this as a random student picker?
faqs.6Desc: Yes — it is one of the most popular uses. Teachers add their class roster, then spin the wheel to call on a student.

embed.title: How to Embed Random Wheel
embed.heroDesc: Embed our random wheel easily on your website or blog. Follow these simple steps below to generate the HTML iframe code.
embed.step1Desc: First, configure the items you want on your wheel. Add names, choices, or anything else you'd like to spin for, and customize their colors.
embed.step2Desc: Next, adjust the size and accessibility title for your embedded wheel.
embed.step3Desc: Finally, generate the code and copy it to your website's HTML.
embed.instructions: Use the controls below to set up the content and appearance of your wheel. Then, configure the embed settings and generate the code to place it on your website.
embed.codeDesc: Copy the code below to embed this configured wheel on your website:
embed.errConfigure: Error generating code. Please configure the wheel first.
embed.errEmpty: Please add at least one item to the wheel before generating embed code.
